theme_and_archetype.domain: Internal SaaS Tool / Real Estate Scoring
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A property scoring tool requires precision, authority, and functional clarity. The Swiss Brutalist aesthetic (monochrome base + stark primary accent colors) perfectly frames the strict tier classifications and data-heavy forms without distracting the advisor.

typography.guidelines: Cabinet Grotesk for high-impact scores, tier badges, and major section headers. Manrope for the dense data tables, form inputs, and UI labels. Never use Inter. Avoid generic bolding; use font-black for impact or font-light for contrast.

sizing.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-slate-950

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12) for the scoring form to reduce cognitive load. Dense spacing (p-4, gap-4) for the results dashboard and data tables.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Sharp, unadorned. Use rounded-none. Expose the grid where possible with border-collapse and visible border-b or border-r lines.
layout_and_spacing.multi_step_form: Split layout: Left rail (col-span-1) for sticky navigation and live score summary. Right rail (col-span-3) for the actual category questions. Pure HTML/Tailwind for the structural layout.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_table: Dense data table, sharp edges. Row hover state should just be a crisp background shift (bg-slate-100) and text color emphasis.

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none). Primary CTA is solid black. Hover states should feature a rigid 2px solid shadow offset (Neo-brutalist touch: shadow-[2px_2px_0_0_#0A0A0A] -translate-y-[1px]).
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Override to rounded-none, border-slate-950/20. Focus state must be crisp: focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:border-slate-950.
components.segmented_control_scoring: For the 1-5 scoring mechanism, do not use dropdowns. Use a horizontal radio group styled as connected square buttons (border-r-0 last:border-r). Selected state inverts to black background with white text.
components.cards: Avoid soft floaty cards. Use flat rectangular containers with a 1px solid border (border-slate-950).
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use a Radar Chart on the Final Result Page to visualize the 8 property categories. Stroke: black, Fill: black/10.
components.navigation: Sticky top header (bg-white border-b border-slate-950 z-50). Must not be transparent. Include Logo, Dashboard link, 'New Evaluation' button.
components.badges: Square, uppercase. TIER 1, TIER 2, TIER 3. Colors must match the brand_and_tiers palette exactly.

motion.hover: Snappy, not floaty. Use transition-transform duration-150 ease-out.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (translate-y-2) for form steps to maintain spatial awareness.
motion.feedback: Micro-interactions on clicking the 1-5 score buttons (slight scale down scale-95).

assets.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight). Keep them sharp and technical.

images.description: Abstract brutalist architecture in grayscale. Use for the dashboard empty state (when no evaluations exist), applying a heavy white overlay (bg-white/80) to ensure text legibility over it.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: FORM SCORING LOGIC: Build a robust multi-step form for the 8 categories. Sub-factors inside each category are scored 1-5. Display the calculated weighted percentage live on the side/bottom.

OVERRIDE RULE (CRITICAL): If Availability Reliability OR Owner Alignment average score falls below a threshold (e.g., < 3 or whatever you deem 'weak'), block Tier 1 classification regardless of the overall score. Display a high-contrast override warning banner on the final results page.
RESULT PAGE: The results page should feel like an authoritative report card. Large typographic score (e.g., '88%') paired with the Tier Badge and the 8-axis Radar Chart.
DASHBOARD: Implement a data table with standard columns: Property Name, Location, Date, Score, Tier. Add filters by Tier above the table. Include 'Export PDF' in the row actions.
TESTING: Every single form input, navigation link, 1-5 score button, and submit action MUST include a functional 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='score-location-5').
